chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, suppose you made a report or project with a lot of effort

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but when it was time to email the boss or client, you got blank.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What should I write in the subject?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What is the difference between CC and BCC?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or pressed the send button in a hurry

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and later remembered that I forgot to attach the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If something like this has happened to you

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or you want that it should never happen to you in the future,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then leave the tension at all.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Welcome back to the GIS Tech Guru channel in the class 8 of the computer training course.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the last class, we learned how to make files and documents in the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But friends, in today's corporate and digital era,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: just making a file is not enough.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The most important skill is to send that file professionally to any corner of the world.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whether you do an office job, are freelancing or do your own business.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sending an email is not a basic thing, but a must-have professional skill.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: A correct email can finalize your deal

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and a small mistake can spoil your impression.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Millions of people use Gmail all over the world,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but 90% of people do not know about its powerful and hidden features

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which can do their hours in minutes.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So today's class is going to be very special.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will learn what is email?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to make a new and professional Gmail ID?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How do things like Inbox, Send, and Spam work in Gmail?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will perform many such tasks.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, this is not just a normal tutorial,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is a powerful session related to your professional growth and career.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So watch the video without skipping till the end.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you really want to upgrade your skills,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then subscribe to this channel GIS Tech Guru right now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So without any delay, let's start.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, let's understand what is mail?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, just think,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in the past, if we had to send a letter or message,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then we had to go to the post office and wait for 10-15 days,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: sometimes weeks or months.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many times, until the news reached the other person,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it would get old.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The easiest and fastest solution to this problem is email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When we send the same message or letter electronically via the internet,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then it is called electronic mail, i.e. email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or it reaches in seconds without any delay.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Mail means message,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and if the same message is sent online, it is called email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It has become very easy to send emails in today's digital age.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are many reliable services available for this,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: such as Gmail, Microsoft Outlook,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or it is widely used in corporate offices.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can send emails to anyone in any corner of the world

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: with the help of these platforms like Yahoo Mail, Rediff Mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, let's learn about Gmail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is the most widely used platform in the world.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, we learn how to create a new mail ID.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, you have to open any browser on your computer or mobile.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And in the search bar, you have to search by writing Gmail Create or Gmail Sign Up.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After searching, you will see the official website of Gmail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can click on the first or second link.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click on the website,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you will see the option of signing and create account.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have an existing account, then you can sign.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But to create a new ID, click on Create Account.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, you will be asked who to create an account for.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Personal use, child or business.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Choose the option as per your need.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like for my personal use.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you have to fill your first and last name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This name will be visible when you send an email to someone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example, if your mail id is gistechguru at the rate gmail.com

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and you have filled the name gistechguru,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the other person will see this name in your mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, click on Next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you will be asked about date of birth and gender.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Fill in the correct information and then click on Next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I will fill in something like this for now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the most important step is to choose a username.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will be your mail id, which you will tell others

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so that they can send you mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just like we tell the mobile number for WhatsApp,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we tell the same username for mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Remember that the username should be unique.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have put a name that someone has already taken,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the system will show the username is taken

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and you have to choose another name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can use some numbers in front of that username

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or you can select a username from the suggestions given there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Corporate tip, never use ids like coolboy123 at the rate gmail.com for professional work.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Always keep a simple and soft id like abhishek.sarma at the rate gmail.com.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, you will have to make a strong password.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Try to have big and small letters in the password.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Numbers and special characters like at the rate, highest dollars should be included.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then write the same password again and confirm it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And click on Next.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now there will be verification for the security of the account.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many times you have to put your mobile number and verify it from OTP.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And sometimes the QR code can be scanned and verified.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As you can see the QR code here,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will verify this QR code from my mobile.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For QR code, open Google Lens or Chrome browser on your mobile phone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the camera symbol and open the camera.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then scan the QR code.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: A link will come on it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on it and then verify your account from your mobile phone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, you will be asked for a recovery email address.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is very important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you forget your password in the future,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then with the help of this recovery email, you can access your account again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can fill it if you want or skip it for now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For now, I will put a recovery email address here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After filling all the information, the term and condition will come.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Agree there.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your new Gmail ID is ready.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now to open your mail, click on Google Apps and select Gmail from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your inbox will open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the Gmail interface.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's understand every part of Gmail in detail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: On the top left, you can see the compose button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Compose means writing a new email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whenever you want to send a new email to someone,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: just click on compose, type the email and send it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Below compose, there is an option for inbox.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the inbox, we get all the emails that we receive.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then there is the option for star.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Star means important emails.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you find any email very important,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can put a star on that email so that you can get it easily later.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is the option for snatched.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Snatched means we will see later.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to read an email after a while,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can snatch it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then there is the option for important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the important section, Gmail automatically keeps some emails as important.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like bank, office or email related to accounts.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the sent folder, there are all the emails that you have sent to someone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to see that I had sent an email, then click on send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is the option for draft.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the draft, there are those emails that you started writing but have not sent.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, incomplete emails are saved in the draft.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: All mail has all your emails.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then there is the option for spam.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Spam contains unnecessary or wrong emails.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Keep in mind that sometimes the right mail also goes into spam by mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So check there if necessary.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sometimes it happens that someone sends you an email and tells you again and again that I have sent an email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you are not getting it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So you must check in spam instead of inbox.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Gmail often sends some mails in spam by considering them as suspects.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the option for trash.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Deleted emails come in trash.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, it is our recycle bin.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is the option for search mailbox above.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to search for an old email,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can easily search by writing name, email id or subject from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can see three tabs in the inbox.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the option for primary.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are personal emails in it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the option for promotions.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are emails like offers, shopping and ads.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the option for social.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are emails like LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This automatically keeps the email in different categories.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will see the setting icon on the top right.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can change the setting of Gmail from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And here is your profile icon

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: with which you can manage an account,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: create a new account or sign out.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, in today's class,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we have made our own professional Gmail ID.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And we have understood its entire interface.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Making an ID was just the first step.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The real work is to write a professional email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Our next class is going to be very forcing.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In which we will learn

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: what is 2ccbcc?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to keep the subject and tone of the email?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to use Mr., Mrs. and Ms. correctly?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to put your auto signature?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And how to stop the email sent by mistake?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will learn a lot more.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Your task for today is

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to make a good, clean email ID today.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And check its interface yourself.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you liked today's class,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then do like the video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See you in the next class.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Till then keep practicing.

What is the difference between CC and BCC? Or pressed the send button in a hurry and later remembered that I forgot to attach the file. If something like this has happened to you or you want that it should never happen to you in the future, then leave the tension at all. Welcome back to the GIS Tech Guru channel in the class 8 of the computer training course. In the last class, we learned how to make files and documents in the computer. A correct email can finalize your deal and a small mistake can spoil your impression. Friends, just think, in the past, if we had to send a letter or message, then we had to go to the post office and wait for 10-15 days, sometimes weeks or months. Many times, until the news reached the other person, it would get old. The easiest and fastest solution to this problem is email. When we send the same message or letter electronically via the internet, then it is called electronic mail, i.e. email. Or it reaches in seconds without any delay. Mail means message, and if the same message is sent online, it is called email. It has become very easy to send emails in today's digital age. There are many reliable services available for this, such as Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or it is widely used in corporate offices. You can send emails to anyone in any corner of the world with the help of these platforms like Yahoo Mail, Rediff Mail. So friends, let's learn about Gmail. It is the most widely used platform in the world. First of all, we learn how to create a new mail ID. For this, you have to open any browser on your computer or mobile. And in the search bar, you have to search by writing Gmail Create or Gmail Sign Up. After searching, you will see the official website of Gmail. You can click on the first or second link. As soon as you click on the website, you will see the option of signing and create account. If you have an existing account, then you can sign. But to create a new ID, click on Create Account. After this, you will be asked who to create an account for. Personal use, child or business. Choose the option as per your need. Like for my personal use. Now you have to fill your first and last name. This name will be visible when you send an email to someone. For example, if your mail id is gistechguru at the rate gmail.com and you have filled the name gistechguru, then the other person will see this name in your mail. After this, click on Next. Now you will be asked about date of birth and gender. Fill in the correct information and then click on Next. I will fill in something like this for now. Now the most important step is to choose a username. This will be your mail id, which you will tell others so that they can send you mail. Just like we tell the mobile number for WhatsApp, we tell the same username for mail. Remember that the username should be unique. If you have put a name that someone has already taken, then the system will show the username is taken and you have to choose another name. You can use some numbers in front of that username or you can select a username from the suggestions given there. Corporate tip, never use ids like coolboy123 at the rate gmail.com for professional work. Always keep a simple and soft id like abhishek.sarma at the rate gmail.com. After this, you will have to make a strong password. Try to have big and small letters in the password. Numbers and special characters like at the rate, highest dollars should be included. Then write the same password again and confirm it. And click on Next. Now there will be verification for the security of the account. Many times you have to put your mobile number and verify it from OTP. And sometimes the QR code can be scanned and verified. As you can see the QR code here, Now I will verify this QR code from my mobile. For QR code, open Google Lens or Chrome browser on your mobile phone. Click on the camera symbol and open the camera. Then scan the QR code. A link will come on it. Click on it and then verify your account from your mobile phone. After this, you will be asked for a recovery email address. This is very important. Now to open your mail, click on Google Apps and select Gmail from here. Now your inbox will open. This is the Gmail interface. Now let's understand every part of Gmail in detail. On the top left, you can see the compose button. Compose means writing a new email. Whenever you want to send a new email to someone, just click on compose, type the email and send it. Below compose, there is an option for inbox. In the inbox, we get all the emails that we receive. Then there is the option for star. Star means important emails. If you find any email very important, then you can put a star on that email so that you can get it easily later. There is the option for snatched. Snatched means we will see later. If you want to read an email after a while, then you can snatch it. Then there is the option for important. In the important section, Gmail automatically keeps some emails as important. Like bank, office or email related to accounts. In the sent folder, there are all the emails that you have sent to someone. If you want to see that I had sent an email, then click on send. There is the option for draft. In the draft, there are those emails that you started writing but have not sent. That is, incomplete emails are saved in the draft. All mail has all your emails. Then there is the option for spam. Spam contains unnecessary or wrong emails. Keep in mind that sometimes the right mail also goes into spam by mistake. So check there if necessary. Sometimes it happens that someone sends you an email and tells you again and again that I have sent an email. And you are not getting it. So you must check in spam instead of inbox. Gmail often sends some mails in spam by considering them as suspects. Here is the option for trash. Deleted emails come in trash. That is, it is our recycle bin. There is the option for search mailbox above. If you want to search for an old email, then you can easily search by writing name, email id or subject from here. You can see three tabs in the inbox. This is the option for primary. There are personal emails in it. This is the option for promotions. There are emails like offers, shopping and ads. This is the option for social. There are emails like LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter. This automatically keeps the email in different categories. You will see the setting icon on the top right. You can change the setting of Gmail from here. And here is your profile icon with which you can manage an account, create a new account or sign out. Till then keep practicing.
